title: Heltec V3 WiFi backhaul border router
description: Implement WiFi station mode, upstream IPv6 prefix, RPL root, and bridging for Heltec WiFi LoRa 32 V3 as 6LBR. Break into issues for Kconfig, main.c init, RPL integration, testing. Parent of project-LICHEN-79pj.
notes: Broken into child tasks sl32.1 (Kconfig), sl32.2 (WiFi init in main.c), sl32.3 (RPL prefix integration), sl32.4 (testing). This fulfills the epic description. Ready for implementation in child issues. Updated 2026-07-22.
